message:
test(tx_idempotency): add property tests for transaction idempotency module

607-line proptest suite for the tx_idempotency module validating:
- IdempotencyKey content-addressed hashing properties (determinism,
  collision resistance across varying tx_id/step_index/input_hash)
- StepExecutionRecord hash-chain linkage integrity
- TxExecutionLedger append ordering and duplicate rejection
- DeduplicationGuard bloom-filter fast path with exact-match fallback
- ResumeContext crash recovery: last-committed step identification
  and pending compensation chain reconstruction
- Round-trip serialization fidelity for all public types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
